name: GuardRail Security Check
description: Autonomous security remediation on file save - detects vulnerabilities and generates secure fixes

then.prompt:
A file was just saved. Analyze it for security vulnerabilities using GuardRail AI:
1. Extract the file content and recent changes
2. Run security analysis via src/index.js
3. If risks detected: generate remediation, create AWS secrets if needed, show diff preview
4. Present findings with clear accept/reject options
5. If accepted, apply the patch and log the event

File: {{file}}
Language: {{language}}

Execute the full GuardRail pipeline now.
